en: Now Shephatiah the son of Mattan, Gedaliah the son of Pashhur, Jucal the son of Shelemiah, and Pashhur the son of Malchiah heard the words that Jeremiah was saying to all the people,
zh: 瑪坦的兒子示法提雅、巴施戶珥的兒子基大利、示利米雅的兒子猶甲、瑪基雅的兒子示巴戶珥，聽見耶利米對眾民宣講以下的話：

en: "Thus says the LORD: He who stays in this city shall die by the sword, by famine, and by pestilence, but he who goes out to the Chaldeans shall live. He shall have his life as a prize of war, and live.
zh: “耶和華這樣說：‘凡留在這城裡的，必因刀劍、饑荒、瘟疫而死；但出去向迦勒底人投降的，必可以活著；他們必撿回自己的性命，得以生存。’

en: Thus says the LORD: This city shall surely be given into the hand of the army of the king of Babylon and be taken."
zh: 耶和華這樣說：‘這城必交在巴比倫王軍隊的手中，巴比倫王必攻取這城。’”

en: Then the officials said to the king, "Let this man be put to death, for he is weakening the hands of the soldiers who are left in this city, and the hands of all the people, by speaking such words to them. For this man is not seeking the welfare of this people, but their harm."
zh: 於是眾領袖對王說：“這人應該處死，因為他向這城裡剩下的軍兵和眾民說了這樣的話，使他們的手都軟弱無力。這人不是為這人民求平安，卻是惹來災禍的。”

en: King Zedekiah said, "Behold, he is in your hands, for the king can do nothing against you."
zh: 西底家王說：“看哪！他在你們手中；王不能作甚麼反對你們。”

en: So they took Jeremiah and cast him into the cistern of Malchiah, the king's son, which was in the court of the guard, letting Jeremiah down by ropes. And there was no water in the cistern, but only mud, and Jeremiah sank in the mud.
zh: 他們就拿住耶利米，把他丟在王子瑪基雅的井裡，那井是在衛兵的院子裡的；他們用繩子把耶利米縋下去。井裡沒有水，只有淤泥；耶利米就陷在淤泥中。

en: When Ebed-melech the Ethiopian, a eunuch who was in the king's house, heard that they had put Jeremiah into the cistern- the king was sitting in the Benjamin Gate-
zh: 宮中的臣宰古實人以伯．米勒，在王宮裡聽見他們把耶利米關在井裡的消息 ，

en: Ebed-melech went from the king's house and said to the king,
zh: 以伯．米勒就從王宮裡出來，稟告王說：

en: "My lord the king, these men have done evil in all that they did to Jeremiah the prophet by casting him into the cistern, and he will die there of hunger, for there is no bread left in the city."
zh: “我主我王啊！這些人對耶利米先知所作的一切真是惡毒，他們把他丟在井裡；在那地方他必餓死，因為城裡再沒有糧食了。”

en: Then the king commanded Ebed-melech the Ethiopian, "Take three men with you from here, and lift Jeremiah the prophet out of the cistern before he dies."
zh: 於是王吩咐古實人以伯．米勒說：“你從這裡帶三十個人，在耶利米先知未死以前，把他從井裡拉上來。”

en: So Ebed-melech took the men with him and went to the house of the king, to a wardrobe in the storehouse, and took from there old rags and worn-out clothes, which he let down to Jeremiah in the cistern by ropes.
zh: 以伯．米勒就帶人進王宮去，到儲物室下面的一個房間，從那裡取了些破布爛衣，用繩子縋下井裡給耶利米。

en: Then Ebed-melech the Ethiopian said to Jeremiah, "Put the rags and clothes between your armpits and the ropes." Jeremiah did so.
zh: 古實人以伯．米勒對耶利米說：“把這些破布爛衣墊在你的腋下，然後束上繩子。”耶利米就這樣作了。

en: Then they drew Jeremiah up with ropes and lifted him out of the cistern. And Jeremiah remained in the court of the guard.
zh: 於是他們用繩子把耶利米從井裡拉出來；這樣，耶利米可以住在衛兵的院子裡。

en: King Zedekiah sent for Jeremiah the prophet and received him at the third entrance of the temple of the LORD. The king said to Jeremiah, "I will ask you a question; hide nothing from me."
zh: 後來，西底家王派人去把耶利米先知帶到耶和華殿中的第三道門那裡去見他。王對耶利米說：“我要問你一件事，你甚麼都不可以向我隱瞞。”

en: Jeremiah said to Zedekiah, "If I tell you, will you not surely put me to death? And if I give you counsel, you will not listen to me."
zh: 耶利米對西底家說：“我若告訴你，你不是要殺死我嗎？我若向你建議，你必不聽從我。”

en: Then King Zedekiah swore secretly to Jeremiah, "As the LORD lives, who made our souls, I will not put you to death or deliver you into the hand of these men who seek your life."
zh: 於是西底家王私下向耶利米起誓，說：“我指著那創造我們生命的永活的耶和華起誓：我決不殺死你，也不把你交在這些尋索你性命的人的手裡。”

en: Then Jeremiah said to Zedekiah, "Thus says the LORD, the God of hosts, the God of Israel: If you will surrender to the officials of the king of Babylon, then your life shall be spared, and this city shall not be burned with fire, and you and your house shall live.
zh: 耶利米對西底家說：“耶和華萬軍的 神、以色列的 神這樣說：‘你若出去歸降巴比倫王的將領，你的性命就可以存活；這城也不會被火焚燒，你和你一家都可以存活。

en: But if you do not surrender to the officials of the king of Babylon, then this city shall be given into the hand of the Chaldeans, and they shall burn it with fire, and you shall not escape from their hand."
zh: 但你若不出去歸降巴比倫王的將領，這城就必交在迦勒底人的手中；他們必放火燒毀這城，你自己也不能從他們的手裡逃脫。’”

en: King Zedekiah said to Jeremiah, "I am afraid of the Judeans who have deserted to the Chaldeans, lest I be handed over to them and they deal cruelly with me."
zh: 西底家王對耶利米說：“我害怕那些已向迦勒底人投降的猶大人，恐怕迦勒底人把我交在他們手中，他們就會凌辱我。”

en: Jeremiah said, "You shall not be given to them. Obey now the voice of the LORD in what I say to you, and it shall be well with you, and your life shall be spared.
zh: 耶利米說：“迦勒底人必不會把你交給他們。求你聽從我對你所說的耶和華的話；這樣，你就可以平安無事，你的性命也可以存活。

en: But if you refuse to surrender, this is the vision which the LORD has shown to me:
zh: 你若拒絕出去投降，耶和華指示我的話就是這樣：

en: Behold, all the women left in the house of the king of Judah were being led out to the officials of the king of Babylon and were saying, "' Your trusted friends have deceived you and prevailed against you; now that your feet are sunk in the mud, they turn away from you.'
zh: 看哪！猶大王宮裡所有剩下的婦女，都必被帶出來，去到巴比倫王的將領那裡。那些婦女必對你說： ‘你的盟友煽惑了你，左右了你； 現在你的腳陷在泥沼中， 他們就都離棄你。’

en: All your wives and your sons shall be led out to the Chaldeans, and you yourself shall not escape from their hand, but shall be seized by the king of Babylon, and this city shall be burned with fire."
zh: 你所有的后妃和你的兒女，都必被帶出來，去到迦勒底人那裡；你自己也不能從他們的手裡逃脫，因為你必被巴比倫王的手抓住；這城也必被火燒毀 。”

en: Then Zedekiah said to Jeremiah, "Let no one know of these words, and you shall not die.
zh: 西底家對耶利米說：“不要給人知道這些話，這樣你就不會死。

en: If the officials hear that I have spoken with you and come to you and say to you, 'Tell us what you said to the king and what the king said to you; hide nothing from us and we will not put you to death,'
zh: 眾領袖若聽見了我和你說過話，就會來見你，對你說：‘告訴我們，你對王說了些甚麼？不可向我們隱瞞，我們就不會殺死你。王又對你說了些甚麼？’

en: then you shall say to them, 'I made a humble plea to the king that he would not send me back to the house of Jonathan to die there.'"
zh: 你就要對他們說：‘我只是把我的懇求呈到王面前，求他不要把我送回約拿單的房子去，免得我死在那裡。’”

en: Then all the officials came to Jeremiah and asked him, and he answered them as the king had instructed him. So they stopped speaking with him, for the conversation had not been overheard.
zh: 所有的領袖果然來見耶利米，查問他；他就照著王所吩咐的這一切話告訴他們。於是他們不再追問他，因為王和他說話的內容沒有給人聽見。

en: And Jeremiah remained in the court of the guard until the day that Jerusalem was taken.
zh: 這樣，耶利米留在衛兵的院子裡，直到耶路撒冷被攻取的那一天。
